sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60189" key="krou/nwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρούνωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n60189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κρουνός</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg002.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κ. βρότειον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:6:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
